Name: Short description
Explain available tools: When the life science scientist (LSS) clicks the help button on the main screen, a new window opens that contains a brief explanation about when to use each of the tools on the main screen.
perform BLASTP: The life science scientist (LSS) enters protein sequence in FASTA format or FASTA file of protein in the BLASTP screen. The LSS selects the correct settings, uploads a custom database if desired, and presses the BLAST button once finished. The output of the BLASTP is stored in the downloads folder of the user and shown in a new screen.
Calculate sequence statistics: The life science scientist (LSS) enters a protein or DNA sequence in the text box in the statistics screen and presses the statistics button. Subsequently, the statistics of the DNA or protein sequence are shown on the same screen.
Explain detailed use of tool: The life science scientist (LSS) presses the help button on the screen of the respective tool to obtain more detailed information about how to use the tool and how to interpret the results of the tool.

Name: Precondition
Explain available tools: The LSS is on the main screen of the application.
perform BLASTP: The LSS is on the BLASTP screen of the application.
Calculate sequence statistics: The LSS is on the statistics screen of the application.
Explain detailed use of tool: The LSS is on the screen of the respective tool.

Name: Postcondition
Explain available tools: A new window opens that contains a brief explanation about when to use each of the tools.
perform BLASTP: BLASTP output is stored in the downloads folder of the LSS and shown in a new window.
Calculate sequence statistics: The statistics of the entered protein or DNA sequence are shown in the same window.
Explain detailed use of tool: A new window opens that contains an explanation about how to use the respective tool and how to interpret the results.

Name: Error situation
perform BLASTP: LSS forgets to enter query sequence or file before pushing BLAST button.
Calculate sequence statistics: LSS forgets to enter protein or DNA sequence in the text box before pressing the statistics button.

Name: System state in the event of an error
Calculate sequence statistics: No statistics of the protein or DNA sequence will be outputted.

Name: Trigger
Explain available tools: The LSS pushes the help button on the main screen
perform BLASTP: The LSS pushes the BLAST button on the BLASTP screen.
Calculate sequence statistics: The LSS pushes the statistics button on the statistics screen.
Explain detailed use of tool: The LSS pushes the help button on the screen of the respective tool.

Name: Standard process
Explain available tools: 1) LSS navigates to the main screen. 2) LSS pushes the help button. 3) a new window containing a brief explanation about when to use each of the tools on the main screen pops up.
perform BLASTP: 1) LSS enters protein sequence in FASTA format or uploads FASTA file of protein. 2) LSS sets BLASTP parameters. 3) LSS uploads FASTA file of custom database if desired. 4) LSS presses the BLAST button. 5)  LSS analyzes BLASTP results in new window or its downloads folder.
Calculate sequence statistics: 1) LSS enters protein or DNA sequence in the text box on the statistics screen. 2) LSS presses the statistics button. 3) LSS analyzes the calculated statistics shown on the same screen.
Explain detailed use of tool: 1) the LSS navigates to the screen of the respective tool. 2) The LSS presses the help button. 3) A new window containing a brief explanation on how to use the tool and how to interpret the results of the tool appears.

Name: Alternative process
perform BLASTP: 4') LSS forgets to enter protein sequence in FASTA format or to upload FASTA file of protein before pressing the BLAST button. 5') Error message is shown: Please enter either a protein in FASTA file format in the text box or upload a query FASTA file of a protein.
Calculate sequence statistics: 2') LSS forgets to enter protein or DNA sequence before pressing the statistics button. 3') Error message is shown: Please enter a protein or DNA sequence in the text box.
